creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Brooks Davis from comment #1)
I update my ports daily using "portsnap" I ran it immediately before attempting to update the port. When it failed the first time, I ran "portsnap" again and then tried to up date the port. Of course it failed.

I just ran it again:

Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 7 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from your-org.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching snapshot metadata... done.
Updating from Wed Aug  5 23:49:55 EDT 2015 to Thu Aug  6 14:21:24 EDT 2015.

I then ran this: /usr/sbin/pkg version -vL=

llvm35-3.5.2                       <   needs updating (index has 3.5.2_1)

I just now attempted to update the port, and it failed with the exact same message.
